subcodes.first_line: O namesake of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! 'Abbás in the Arabic tongue signifieth "lion," yet this name must needs have its true [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سمی عبدالبهاء عباس در لغت عرب بمعنی غضنفر است ولی این اسم را مسمی لازم و
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @call to action, @naming of children; of individuals, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics
